case_title: MOO JIN YI VS. HOWARD F. FINE

docket_entries.description: (SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR: JOHN H. KAY TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF MOO J. YIN FILED BY PLAINTIFF YI, MOO JIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YI, MOO JIN AS TO DEFENDANT FINE, HOWARD F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED NOV-12-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FINE, HOWARD F.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF YI, MOO JIN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-20-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MOO JIN IS PRESENT ASSITEE BY WITH THE ENGLISH TO KOREAN TRANLATIONS. DEFENDANT HOWARD F. FINE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YI, MOO JIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FINE, HOWARD F. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
